description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden shipping crate with horizontal plank textures and a weathered, slightly blue-tinted finish. The front face features a prominent black circular stamp with the word 'CERTIFIED' and a barcode shipping label, suggesting it has been processed for transport or delivery. The crate's surfaces show signs of wear, with faded paint and scuff marks, indicating it has been handled or stored outdoors. The top and sides are constructed from the same wooden planks, with visible seams and a slightly rough, matte appearance. The crate appears solid and robust, suitable for containing or protecting large items during transit. Its utilitarian design is typical for parcels used in industrial or urban shipping environments.
description: A large, weathered wooden shipping crate with a barcode label and certification stamp, featuring horizontal planks and a blue-tinted, worn finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the certification stamp and barcode label on the weathered wooden planks.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the horizontal plank texture and blue-tinted wear, with no visible labels.
description_view_2: Rear view with uniform weathered planks and faded blue marks, no distinguishing features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with similar plank texture and weathering, lacking any labels or stamps.
